overview.description: The Innovator Nasdaq-100 Managed 10 Buffer ETF (NBFR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund provides Nasdaq-100 equity exposure with a rolling 10% downside buffer over one-year periods. The fund uses a laddered options strategy to help reduce losses while giving up a portion of upside returns. NBFR was launched on Feb 23, 2026 and is issued by Innovator.
